title: Web Animations
abstract: Web Animations defines a timing and animation model for changes to web page presentation and related programming interfaces.
description: A technology record for animation timing, synchronization and interface motion on the web.
roleInEcosystem: Web Animations helps Electronic Artefacts treat motion as a timed interface and storytelling layer rather than decorative movement.
bodyHtml:
Role

Web Animations provides a model for timing, playback and synchronization in browser interfaces.

Use

Electronic Artefacts can use it for interface motion, interactive essays and state transitions that clarify graph navigation.

References

See the W3C Web Animations specification.
